message:
fix: SHA-256 content fingerprint for preview live-reload; refresh watch-export path set on config change

Preview live-reload detection:
- Replace mtime-based latest_modified_token with SHA-256 content
  fingerprint (fingerprint_bundle_recursive) so same-size same-mtime
  file rewrites are reliably detected.
- Sort directory entries for deterministic hashing; hash file content,
  symlink targets, and relative paths with null separators.
- Add sha2 crate dependency.
- Add regression test latest_modified_token_changes_for_same_size_rewrite.
- Update existing token assertions from >0 / nonzero to !is_empty().

Watch-export path reconciliation:
- Add reconcile_watch_export_paths() to re-resolve workspace config each
  poll cycle, detecting added/removed repo issue files without restart.
- Extract watch_export_token_for_path() helper to deduplicate error
  wrapping.
- Log refreshed source set size; force a re-export cycle when path set
  changes even if no individual file changed.
- Add regression test reconcile_watch_export_paths_adds_new_workspace_repo_issue_file.

Beads tracking:
- Close bd-fi6s (preview live-reload SHA-256 fingerprinting).
- Open bd-oagf (watch-export path refresh on config change).
- Compact .br_history: remove 4 stale 20260323 snapshots, add 4 new
  20260327 snapshots.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
